title: Onnavida Song Lyrics Virumaandi
stanzas:
vaakkupada kedachaan virumaandi
satchi solla chandhiran varuvandi
sadhisanam ellaam avanthandi
ketavaram udane thandhandi

Allikodiya kaathu asaikkuthu
asaiyum kolathu kodumbu
koosudhu.
pullarichu pogum
enna polave alapaayudhu.

nilavil kaayum vetti selaiyum
namma paathu jodi serudhu
serthu vacha kaathu
thudhi paadudhu
shruthi serudhu

enna pudhu thaagam
anal aagudhe en dhegam
yaaru solli thandhu vandhadhu
kana kana vandhu kolludhu

Unkooda naan koodi
irundhida enaku jenmam
onnu podhumaa
nooru jenmam venum
adha ketkuren saamiya

nooru jenmam namaku
podhumaa vera varam
yedhum ketpamaa
saagaa varam ketpom
saamiya andha saamiya

kaathaa alanjaalum
kadalaaga nee irundhalum
aagaasamaa aana podhilum
enna uru edutha podhilum
serndhethan porakkanum
irukkanum kalakkanum

vazhka thara vandhaa virumaandi
vazhthu solla chandhiran varuvandi
sadhisanam ellaam avanthandi
ketavaram udane thandhandi

seo.title: Onnavida Song Lyrics Virumaandi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Onnavida?

The song Onnavida explores themes of love and connection, expressing the feelings of longing and the absence of true companionship.

What is the context of this song in the movie Virumaandi?

In Virumaandi, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional struggles and relationships.

Who are the singers of Onnavida?

The song features the talented voices of Kamal Haasan and Shreya Goshal, creating a captivating duet.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Onnavida was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, known for his unique and soulful melodies.

When was Onnavida released?

Onnavida was released on January 14, 2004, as part of the movie Virumaandi.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Onnavida, the emotional depth of love and longing is beautifully portrayed through the voices of Kamal Haasan and Shreya Goshal. The song serves as a poignant reflection of the protagonist's inner turmoil and desire for connection. With Ilaiyaraaja's soulful composition, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. This track not only enhances the narrative of Virumaandi but also resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Onnavida from the film Virumaandi is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Kamal Haasan and Shreya Goshal, paired with Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical beauty that makes this track a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: In this world, there is nothing like you, nothing at all.
No one can say you are a relationship.
Words have failed, Virumaandi. The truth will come, and the moon will arrive. All the offerings will be given immediately.
No one understands your worth, not even them.
What is yours... no one understands it.
What is yours... what is mine.
The wind of the jasmine flower is calling, and the desire is gathering. Like a flower that blooms, I am singing.
The moonlight and the bright light are joining together. When they come together, the wind sings praises, and the melody joins in.
My new thirst is not fulfilled. Who has come and told my body? It has come and taken me piece by piece.
This is called the ultimate end, the ultimate end, the ultimate end.
The path of the wind is like a temple bell that rings for us.
In the night, the dew falls, and we think of it as a sweet sound... what is yours...
If I were to be with you, is one life enough? I want a hundred lives, I ask you, God.
Is a hundred lives enough for us? Will we ask for any other boon? We will ask for a boon, God, that God.
Even if you are a sea, even if you are a sky, in the end, I must be there, in the place I choose, I must be there, I must be strong.
What is yours... in this world, there is nothing like you, nothing at all.
No one can say you are a relationship.
Life has come, Virumaandi. The truth will come, and the moon will arrive. All the offerings will be given immediately.
